question:
Tumpuses are transparent. Each impus is cold. Impuses are yumpuses. Every yumpus is sour. Yumpuses are zumpuses. Zumpuses are not amenable. Every zumpus is a numpus. Numpuses are wooden. Numpuses are rompuses. Each rompus is not transparent. Every rompus is a dumpus. Dumpuses are dull. Each dumpus is a vumpus. Vumpuses are large. Each vumpus is a wumpus. Every wumpus is floral. Each wumpus is a jompus. Wren is an impus.

Is the following statement true or false? Wren is transparent.
